name: Week 2 KB Conditioning
description: Thursday = refine what you learned Tuesday + your requested moves. Skill block first (TGU + windmill practice), then your picks (overhead lunges + Simba lift), then a short complex to finish. Still a real workout — just with more brain.

exercises.notes: Easy swings to prime the hinge
PRACTICE — this is Tuesday's new move. Go light (15lb or less). Focus on left side catching up to right. Slow is smooth, smooth is fast.
You loved these in W1. Light weight, eyes on the bell, deep hip hinge. Pairs beautifully with TGU — same shoulder stability pattern.

sets.name: Your Picks: Overhead Lunges + Simba Lift

exercises.notes: Lock KB out overhead with one arm. Step forward into lunge. Keep arm LOCKED and torso upright. Shoulder stability + legs. Go light — 15-25lb to start.
The 'Simba lift' — goblet squat down, then as you stand, extend the KB straight out in front at shoulder height, arms locked. Hold for a beat. Present that lion cub. Use a light KB.
Clean to rack, strict press. Tuesday you did these at 50lb — use the same or lighter here.
Squat to press, one fluid motion

tips: Thursday = refine Tuesday's new moves + try your requested exercises
Skill block is NOT conditioning — take your time, focus on form. Rest as needed between sides.
TGU: your right side got fluid Tuesday, now get the left side there too
Overhead lunges: start lighter than you think — the stability demand is sneaky
Simba lift: the front raise portion is the hard part. Arms locked, hold at the top for a beat.
Complex is only 3 rounds — it's the finisher, not the main event
Light bell for skill block (15-25lb), working bell for complex (50lb)
